de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class AutoSaver

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AutoSaver
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProverTaskListener

    public class AutoSaver
extends Object
implements ProverTaskListener
    Saves intermediate proof artifacts during strategy execution. An AutoSaver instance saves periodically and the final proof state if it is closed. The default save interval can be set using the static #init(int, boolean) method. Before the saver is registered as a listener, a proof must be set with setProof(). AutoSaver writes .key files to a temporary location (i.e., "/tmp" on most Linux machines). These are possibly overwritten on each strategy run. Write errors (e.g., missing permissions) are silently ignored.
    Author:
    bruns

    • Method Detail

      • setDefaultValues

        public static void setDefaultValues(int saveInterval,
                    boolean saveClosedProof)
        Set default values.
        Parameters:
        saveInterval - the interval (= number of proof steps) to periodically save
        saveClosedProof - whether to save the final closed proof

      • getDefaultInstance

        public static AutoSaver getDefaultInstance()
        Create a new instance using default values, or null if auto save is disabled by default. The default values can be set through AutoSaver.setDefaultValues()

      • setProof

        public void setProof(Proof p)
        Set the proof to be saved. Call this method before adding this listener to the strategy.
        Parameters:
        p - proof to save, must not be null

      • taskProgress

        public void taskProgress(int progress)
        Saves the proof at the end of an interval.
        Specified by:
        taskProgress in interface ProverTaskListener
        Parameters:
        progress - indicates how much work has been done relative to the value of size passed in #taskStarted(String, int).
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if no proof was set

      • taskStarted

        public void taskStarted(TaskStartedInfo info)
        Specified by:
        taskStarted in interface ProverTaskListener

        public void taskFinished(TaskFinishedInfo info)
        Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener
        Called when a task is finished.
        Specified by:
        taskFinished in interface ProverTaskListener
        Parameters:
        info - a TaskFinishedInfo object with additional information

      • save

        private void save(String filename,
        Proof proof)
